notes: Edit target_url and url_pattern to match your site.
Run: launch_browser.bat 9222 to start the shared automation profile.
Use the same automation profile for every project so you only sign in once there.
Open the target site yourself in that Chrome window before running automation.
Run: npx ts-node selectors.ts to populate selectors.json
Run: npx ts-node main.ts after the target tab is open.
